examples: Heres how to achieve that goal.
Heres why we tell white lies.
Heres the size as I measured it.
That gave us clues that we could send back to the lab scientists and say, Heres something that looks suspicious.
Amid the throngs of "wish you were heres" and inappropriate blue-footed booby jokes, we managed to find a handful of cards that appeared to hold messages of substance.
